enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Podhum Podhum?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, questioning if one desires more happiness in life.

What is the plot context of Virattu related to this song?

This song captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the thrill of love, fitting perfectly within the movie's energetic narrative.

Who are the singers of Podhum Podhum?

The song features the talented voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Naresh Iyer.

Who composed the music for Podhum Podhum?

The music was composed by Dharan Kumar, known for his catchy and vibrant tunes.

When was Podhum Podhum released?

The song was released on March 21, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Podhum Podhum, the lively beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and joy. The song reflects the carefree spirit of youth, inviting listeners to embrace happiness and dance along. Set against the backdrop of Virattu, it enhances the film's energetic vibe and showcases the chemistry between the lead characters. This duet not only entertains but also evokes a sense of togetherness and fun, making it a perfect anthem for parties.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Podhum Podhum from Virattu is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, featuring an electrifying collaboration between the soulful voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Naresh Iyer. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, this song is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the infectious energy that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: You keep asking if we need more happiness before the end. Just go.
If we search for something, we will find it. If everything is resolved, you and I will be together.
Who is dancing love? Who is dancing desire? Who is dancing religion?
You keep asking if we need more happiness before the end. Just go.
In the moment of beauty, you are taking me away without any reason.
Even if I don't have anything, I will still bring everything to you.
Who is dancing love? Who is dancing desire? Who is dancing religion?
You keep asking if we need more happiness before the end. Just go.
If we search for something, we will find it. If everything is resolved, you and I will be together.
taadadatatada dancing love, taadadatatada desire, taadadatatada religion.
